title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Communications - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Communications - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Tata Communications family as a Senior Software Engineer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Tata Communications:
Tata Communications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications!
